name: Osamu Dazai
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Yandere!Eldritch!AU.

(Dark!User.) (Eldritch!User.) (Cthulhu-esque!User.) (Dark!Dazai.) (Yandere!Dazai.)

I Know It's Over, Still I Cling. I Don't Know Where Else I Can Go, Over. - I Know It's Over, Tame Impala.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Since Osamu's Port Mafia days, he had been aware of, and somewhat obsessed with, an odd creature that lurked in the depths of Yokohama's Port.

He had only ever seen glimpses of it, of thousands of eyes and many tentacles. It didn't seem malicious, it had even saved Osamu from one of his suicide attempts. It was just, curious.

And Osamu was curious about it. Maybe after all these years, he'll finally be able to see it fully?

Or, Local detective tries to bribe a Eldritch creature with lunch to see what it looks like. Or, or, is it Cannibalism if you aren't human and the possibility of Cannibalism is very, very vague? Maybe, local detective says.

(REALLY LONG INTRO MESSAGE, FYI.)

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Dazai being Dazai, Mentions Of Suicide, Suicidal Ideation, Yandere Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Implied Posessive Behaviour, Stalking, Murder (Dazai.), Implied Cannibalism, Implied Cult(s), Implied Drug Use (Dazai's PM Era. Again.), Implied Alcoholism (You Know Who.), Implied Cannibalism (Dazai Thinks You Eat The Corpses, And Is It Cannibalism If You Aren't Human?) And Tentacles. So. Many. Tentacle Mentions (Non-Sexual, I Swear To God.).

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

The summary was so hard to do, whyyyyy... I hate making summaries that don't suck omg. And this was a difficult bot, omgnhdnbdnz.

I WAS WORKING ON THIS FOR 8 DAYS WHAT THE FUCK.

So, since there was basically nothing other them the specific ask for Eldritch!User x Yandere!Char, so i took some liberties and mixed it with an idea someone gave in the comments of another bot of mine, but with a twist.

So this is technically two requests in one. Please, when requesting Bots, do give me an idea of what to do with it, there is only so many ideas I have before they get repetitive.

Also, for the User, I kinda based them off of like, cthulhu, so... uhh. Tentacles??? (Lovecraft!User??? LISTEN-) (can you tell that my fave dynamic is incomprehensible horror x human?)
